note as N1

end note

class "//CollectionsPattern:://\n**Map**" as Map {
	correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
}

class "Conceptual::\n**ConceptMap**" as ConceptMap {
	correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
	displayLabel : <color:blue>LabelForDisplay</color>
	identifier : <color:blue>Identifier</color>
	usage : <color:blue>InternationalString</color>
	validDates : <color:blue>DateRange</color>
}

class "«dataType»\nCorrespondenceDefinition" as CorrespondenceDefinition #gold {
	commonality : <color:blue>InternationalString</color>
	commonalityCode : <color:blue>ControlledVocabularyEntry</color>
	difference : <color:blue>InternationalString</color>
	matching : <color:blue>MatchingCriterion</color>
}

class "FormatDescription::\n**InstanceVariableMap**" as InstanceVariableMap {
	comparison : <color:blue>ComparisonOperator</color>
	correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
	identifier : <color:blue>Identifier</color>
	setValue : String
}

Map .[dotted].> CorrespondenceDefinition
ConceptMap .[dotted].> CorrespondenceDefinition
InstanceVariableMap .[dotted].> CorrespondenceDefinition

center footer DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI)   1.0 – StructuredDataTypes::CorrespondenceDefinition
